PYTHON.description: Standalone Python 3.10 environment to ensure GUI and dependency compatibility.
PYTHON.purpose: Provide a consistent Python runtime for other tools.

USERINPUT.description: Tkinter-based GUI for capturing multi-line user feedback and approval.
USERINPUT.purpose: Facilitate seamless interaction between AI Agent and user.

GOOGLE_DRIVE.description: Advanced shell for Google Drive (GDS) with background tasks and remote execution.
GOOGLE_DRIVE.purpose: Manage remote files and execute heavy tasks in Colab/Drive.

ALIAS.description: Manage permanent shell aliases across different shell profiles.
ALIAS.purpose: Create and organize helpful terminal shortcuts.

DOWNLOAD.description: Robust file downloader with support for various protocols.
DOWNLOAD.purpose: Fetch resources from the web reliably.

EXTRACT_PDF.description: Enhanced PDF extraction using MinerU with layout preservation.

EXTRACT_IMG.purpose: Extract text and meaning from images.

FILEDIALOG.description: GUI-based file and directory selection dialog.
FILEDIALOG.purpose: Let users select local files for the Agent to process.

IMG2TEXT.description: Vision-based image description using Gemini API.
IMG2TEXT.purpose: Understand complex image content through natural language.

LEARN.description: AI-powered learning assistant for papers and tutorials.
LEARN.purpose: Summarize and explain complex topics interactively.

OPENROUTER.description: Unified interface for various LLMs via OpenRouter.
OPENROUTER.purpose: Access diverse AI models through a single API.

OVERLEAF.description: Local LaTeX compilation and template management.
OVERLEAF.purpose: Build PDFs from LaTeX sources easily.

RUN.description: Tool wrapper that captures output in structured JSON.
RUN.purpose: Enable programmatic access to tool results for the Agent.

SEARCH_PAPER.description: Academic paper search across arXiv and Google Scholar.

UNIMERNET.description: Formula and table extraction from images.
UNIMERNET.purpose: Digitize complex math and tabular data.

LINTER.description: Multi-language code quality and syntax checker.

BACKGROUND.purpose: Run tasks without blocking the agent's execution.
